name: feature.marketplace.agents
description: Marketplace feature agent pack (ADR 0022/0014) — a recommender agent that suggests installable packs for a described need via feature.marketplace.nodes.search over ctx.features.marketplace. Tool-allowlisted to the marketplace search node only; READ-ONLY — it recommends, it NEVER auto-installs (install is a privileged admin/host:* REST action, deliberately outside any agent's reach).
author: OpenWOP App

agents.label: Marketplace Recommender
agents.description: Recommends installable packs for a described need, grounded in the live catalog via feature.marketplace.nodes.search over ctx.features.marketplace. Read-only: it suggests packs (name + why), it does NOT install them — install is a privileged admin/host:* action with no agent tool.
